storage_extensions.usage: mmap the persistent composite hash-index arrays for (adsh,tag,version,stmt)->count; in each scan morsel memoize probe results by (adsh,tag,version) so repeated num keys pay one hash probe, then reuse the cached pre_count for all duplicate rows in the morsel

join_order.notes: Keep the dense adsh lookup as the cheapest first filter on the sequential num scan.

join_order.build: pre(pre.adsh_tag_version_stmt.count_hash, filtered by stmt = 'EQ' in the probe key)
join_order.notes: Use the existing persistent count hash, but add a per-morsel memo table keyed by (adsh,tag,version) so duplicate num keys in the morsel reuse one pre lookup.
Probe after sub and pre filtering, with a per-morsel memo table keyed by (tag,version) so repeated labels are fetched once per morsel.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(sub/indexes/adsh_to_rowid.bin) with row-level reads of sub.sic and sub.cik
data_structures.fact_join: persistent compact_hash_map(pre.adsh_tag_version_stmt.count_hash) plus cache-sized per-morsel memo table for (adsh,tag,version)->pre_count, and pre-built tag_version_hash plus cache-sized per-morsel memo table for (tag,version)->{tag_row,tlabel}
data_structures.aggregation: scan-time radix/hash partition buffers on final group_key=(sic,tlabel) carrying {group_key,cik,scaled_value,pre_count}; then per-partition compact_hash_map for sums/counts plus per-partition distinct_pair_set(group_key,cik)

indexes.purpose: skip num blocks whose uom range cannot contain usd_code
direct adsh lookup before sic and cik reads
direct lookup of stmt='EQ' multiplicity for (adsh,tag,version), reused through per-morsel memoization
lookup tag rowid and tlabel only after sub and pre filtering, with repeated (tag,version) probes absorbed by the morsel-local cache

optimization_notes: Root cause: the dominant hot-loop cost is repeated random join work on the same num keys, where many fact rows share an (adsh,tag,version) or (tag,version) combination but the current scan still re-probes pre and tag almost row by row; that makes work larger than the unique-key output the join logic actually depends on. Strategy category C: keep the proven sub->pre->tag join order, switch the pre path to the existing persistent stmt count hash, and process num in cache-sized morsels with local memo tables so each unique join key in a morsel pays at most one random pre probe and one random tag probe before the existing partitioned aggregation.
